title: niphantha gelida
intro: Niphantha gelida, also known as the 'Cold Water Nettle', is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Bignoniaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its leaves and stems, which are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. Niphantha gelida has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Niphantha gelida include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments.
